title: What will we do? Calcutta High Court refuses urgent intervention against election observer Ajay Sharma IPS
description: The Calcutta High Court on Tuesday declined to pass urgent orders on a plea alleging violation of the Model Code of Conduct (MCC) by IPS Officer Ajay Pal Sharma, who is a police observer in the ongoing West Bengal Assembly Elections.Justice Krishna Rao said the Court would not pass any direction against any officer on the election day till April 29, the final phase of polling in West Bengal. "I am indicating that I will not pass any order with regard to any officer who are in election duty till
